name: Gala Apricot Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, brown sugar, flour and margarine. Press mixture onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 15 minutes. Cool.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water; stir until dissolved. Mix cream cheese and granulated sugar on medium speed with electric mixer until well blended. Gradually add gelatin and brandy, mixing until well combined.
3. Chill mixture slightly; fold in apricots and whipped cream. Pour into crust; chill until firm.
4. Heat combined preserves and brandy over low heat. Cool. Spoon over cheesecake.
